EXPLANATION: The paper "PrefLib: A Library for Preferences" was indeed published in the proceedings of the 3rd International Conference on Algorithmic Decision Theory (ADT 2013). While the automated checker noted an author count mismatch, the conference proceedings and the Semantic Scholar entry confirm that Nicholas Mattei and Toby Walsh are the co-authors of this work.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-642-41575-3_17
FOUND_TITLE: PrefLib: A Library for Preferences
FOUND_AUTHORS: Nicholas Mattei, Toby Walsh
FOUND_YEAR: 2013
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
